SOC as a Service

Agentic AI-Driven 24×7
Security Operations.

Cybertronium's managed SOC fuses petabyte-scale SIEM, SOAR, UEBA and agentic AI to detect, investigate and respond to threats in real time — without the cost or complexity of building your own.

The Modern SOC Problem

Why traditional SOCs are breaking

Adversaries move at machine speed. Most security operations still rely on human-speed workflows, fragmented tools and pay-per-gigabyte SIEMs.

Alert Overload

Analysts drown in thousands of low-fidelity alerts daily, missing the signals that matter.

Overwhelming Backlog

Investigation queues grow faster than teams can triage, leaving threats to dwell.

Escalating SIEM Costs

Legacy SIEMs charge by ingest — visibility shrinks as data and costs explode.

Failed AI Pilots

Off-the-shelf AI agents hallucinate, lack context, and never reach production.

Disjointed Tooling

Siloed EDR, NDR, IAM, cloud and email tools create blind spots between layers.

By the Numbers

The data behind the breakdown

Adversaries move at machine speed. Most security operations still rely on human-speed workflows, fragmented tools and pay-per-gigabyte SIEMs.

11,000+

Alerts per day in the average enterprise SOC

67%

Average mean time to identify a breach

207 days

SEIM ingestion cost growth over 3 years

3.2×

SEIM ingestion cost growth over 3 years

Analyst capacity vs. alert volume

100%
Alerts generated
33%
Alerts triaged
9%
Fully investigated

Where SOC time really goes

55%
Triage & false positives
25%
Tool & data wrangling
12%
Reporting & admin
8%
Actual threat hunting

Sources: IBM Cost of a Data Breach 2024, Forrester SOC Analyst Workload Study, Gartner SIEM Market Guide.

The Cybertronium AI driven SOC Stack

Built on the platforms enterprises trust

We don't reinvent the wheel — we leverage best-in-class agentic AI detection and response platforms, enhanced by Cybertronium analysts in the loop to deliver faster threat detection, more accurate investigations, and stronger security outcomes.

Petabyte-Scale SIEM

Enterprise-grade data layer with 400 days of hot data, full-fidelity retention, and sub-second search across every log source. No tiering, no compromises.

Integrated SOAR

Codified playbooks orchestrate detection, containment and recovery across your security stack — turning hours of manual work into seconds.

UEBA & Behavioural Analytics

Machine-learning baselines surface insider threats, account takeover and lateral movement that static rules will always miss.

Agentic AI Operations

Our agentic platform deploys pre-built and custom AI agents — phishing triage, fraud detection, alert enrichment — with human-in-the-loop and verifiable audit trails.

Threat Hunting

Certified hunters proactively pursue adversary tradecraft mapped to MITRE ATT&CK across your entire estate, 24×7.

Incident Response Retainer

DFIR responders on standby with guaranteed SLAs — containment, forensics, evidence preservation and post-incident reporting.

Works with Your Stack

Bring your logs from where they live. Use Bedrock LLMs, MCP connectors, external DNS, and your existing SIEM/observability tools. No rip-and-replace, no duplicate log storage costs.

Ingest data from any source

No matter where your data comes from, we can ingest, enrich, and offer immediate, actionable insights to accelerate SOC productivity with Comprehensive API for utmost flexibility.

Environment-aware AI agents

Empowers your security and operations teams to create AI-driven agents that function like purpose-built teammates trained to follow your processes, adapt to your workflows, and accelerate outcomes.

AI Agent Library

An autonomous workforce

inside your SOC

Day-one agents that work alongside Cybertronium analysts — every action logged, reviewed and reversible.

Phishing Detection Agent

Analyses email headers, URIs and payloads — flags suspicious messages and auto-investigates user-reported phish.

Alert Triage Agent

Enriches every alert with threat, intel, asset, and identity context — closes false positives before an analyst sees them.

Fraud Investigation Agent

Correlates transactional anomalies with identity and device context to surface fraud in real time.

Threat Intel Agent

Continuously ingests OSINT, dark web and ISAC feeds — maps indicators to your environment automatically.

Vulnerability Agent

Prioritises CVEs by exploitability and business exposure — drafts remediation tickets for IT.

Insider Risk Agent

Monitors behavioural deltas across users and entities to flag data exfiltration and policy abuse.

Cyber Advisory Monitor Agent

Continuously monitors threat intelligence feeds and security advisories to alert you about new vulnerabilities, exploits, and emerging threats.

Agent Creation Assistant

Guides you through building custom AI agents for your security operations, from simple task automation to complex multi-agent workflows.

Incident Response Agent

Triages IT incidents, routes tickets to appropriate teams, and automates initial troubleshooting steps, builds SOAR dynamic workflows to reduce mean time to resolution.

SOC Manager Agent

Coordinates security operations across the team, managing workflows, prioritizing incidents, and ensuring timely response to security events.

How It Works

From signal to resolution — in minutes

A continuous, six-stage operating model that unifies SIEM, SOAR, UEBA, AI agents, threat intelligence and human-led hunting into one defensible workflow.

01

Collect

Ingest telemetry from every part of your estate into our petabyte-scale SIEM in real time with no data caps and zero log-source restrictions.

  • Agent and agentless collection from on-prem, multi-cloud (AWS, GCP, Azure) and SaaS environments via RESTful APIs.
  • 450+ pre-built parsers, custom parsers for bespoke applications.
  • Syslog, syslog-ng, rsyslog, cloud-native log forwarders, Filebeat, Fluent Bit, native SIEM forwarders to accommodate legacy and modern infrastructure alike.
  • SOAR collectors enable automated on-demand data enrichment from additional context-rich sources like CMDB, HR systems, and threat intelligence feeds.
  • All ingested data is stored hot for 12 months to support retroactive investigations; you get a complete searchable audit trail.
02

Detect

Multi-layered detection fabric: SIEM analytics plus AI/ML models, UEBA baselines, and correlation across all data types — network, endpoint and identity — with curated and AI-tuned detection agents.

  • 10,000+ correlation rules and ML detections for MITRE ATT&CK techniques, from initial access to exfiltration and impact.
  • MITRE ATT&CK integration maps every detection to specific tactics/techniques, ensuring coverage and highlighting gaps.
  • UEBA: machine-learning baselines for users, hosts, peers — risk scores escalate automatically.
  • Threat intel enrichment: global intel + context-specific feeds are matched against all observables in near real-time.
  • AI-based anomaly models detect novel threats, zero-day exploits, and sophisticated adversary tradecraft not captured by static rules.
03

Enrich & Hunt

Every alert is automatically enriched from threat intel, asset context and identity data before any analyst involvement.

  • Threat intel from 30+ OSINT and commercial feeds correlated against internal SIEM observations — IOCs, IOAs, CVEs.
  • Asset, user & identity enrichment from AD/Entra, CMDB, and HR data enables business-context-aware prioritisation — a compromised finance controller is not the same as an intern.
  • Certified threat hunters run hypothesis-driven searches using MITRE ATT&CK, live forensics, and Cybertronium’s proprietary hunting notebooks.
  • Strike48 AI-assisted hunting queries surface anomalous patterns across billions of log entries — reducing hunt cycles from days to hours.
  • All findings are logged in MITRE ATT&CK-aligned threat intelligence reports and pushed back into detection rule tuning for continuous improvement.
04

Investigate

Every meaningful alert is investigated with full context before any escalation — false positives are closed and documented automatically.

  • AI co-pilot automates artifact collection, timeline reconstruction, and MITRE ATT&CK mapping — reducing investigation time by up to 80%.
  • Threat-led analysis correlates network, endpoint, identity and cloud telemetry into a unified attack narrative, so analysts grasp scope in seconds.
  • The SOC maintains a dynamic knowledge base — prior investigation notes, entity reputation scores, and customer-specific IOCs ensure the same threat is never re-learned from scratch.
05

Respond

Active containment is triggered automatically or within minutes of analyst confirmation, limiting dwell time and blast radius.

  • Pre-approved SOAR playbooks perform automated containment actions — host isolation, account lock, firewall block, DNS sinkhole — in seconds.
  • Case management integration with ServiceNow, Jira, PagerDuty and custom ticketing systems keeps IT and Security teams aligned.
  • All automated and manual response actions are logged with full audit trails, including operator identity and timestamps, for compliance and post-incident review.
  • Bi-directional SOAR integrations with EDR, NDR, firewall, IAM, email and cloud control planes allow coordinated multi-vector response without switching consoles.
  • Our SOC maintains customer-specific response runbooks, reviewed quarterly, to ensure actions reflect your environment, regulatory requirements, and risk appetite.
06

Report & Improve

Full lifecycle reporting — from individual alert dispositions to board-level dashboards — built on auditable data and continuous tuning.

  • Real-time dashboards with drill-down capability: alert volume, MTTD, MTTR, MITRE ATT&CK heat maps, SLA compliance.
  • Monthly and quarterly executive reports covering threat landscape evolution, detection coverage, response effectiveness, and strategic risk recommendations.
  • Per-alert dispositions include analyst notes, enrichment data, investigation timelines, and MITRE ATT&CK mappings — full accountability and auditability.
  • Continuous detection engineering: new rules, tuning of existing rules, and retirement of low-value detections based on investigation feedback, threat landscape changes, and environment drift.

Service Tiers

Right-sized for your security maturity

A continuous, six-stage operating model that unifies SIEM, SOAR, UEBA, AI agents, threat intelligence and human-led hunting into one defensible workflow.

SOC Essential

SMB/Small Mid-Market

  • 24×7 monitoring (8×5 analyst review)
  • Up to 50 log sources
  • Standard playbooks
  • Monthly threat report
  • Email & portal escalation
Get a Quote

SOC Advanced

Mid-Market to Enterprise

  • 24×7×365 analyst coverage
  • Enterprise-scale log collection
  • Full SOAR automation
  • UEBA + AI agent triage
  • Proactive threat hunting
  • Quarterly purple teaming
Get a Quote

SOC Enterprise

Large Enterprise & Regulated

  • All Advanced features
  • Dedicated SOC pod & TAM
  • Custom AI agents (Strike48 Studio)
  • IR retainer with on-site option
  • OT/ICS & cloud-native coverage
  • Board-level reporting
Get a Quote

Built to meet your regulators

Logs, evidence and reporting aligned to the frameworks your auditors care about.
